content: Remote OK Chief of Staff Malama Health <p>At Malama, moms are our north star. We meet moms where they are, in real lives not ideal patient scenarios, and we design care that works for those who are historically underserved. Our Care Navigators and doulas show up as co-conspirators, not service providers ГўВЂВ” delivering presence, confidence, and calm, and treating every mom as a capable, whole person whose instincts matter. We're outcomes-driven in the truest sense: we generate evidence from every interaction, change what isn't working when the data tells us to, and measure success by whether we're transforming lives, not just completing encounters. We step into the gap for moms, for each other, and for the communities we serve ГўВЂВ” and if that's the kind of work that gets you out of bed, then this role is for you.</p><p>We are seeking a Chief of Staff to work directly with our leadership team at a pivotal moment in Malama's growth. This role is two things in equal measure: the operational backbone that keeps our organization running, and the market activation engine that gets Malama contracted, credentialed, and delivering care in new states. You will oversee the finance and HR functions that keep us compliant and well-run, and own the payer operations work that makes us scalable. If you move fluidly between vendor oversight and health plan strategy and you're passionate about equitable maternal health, then this role is for you.</p><p></p><p>Role Responsibilities:</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Oversee Finance and Accounting Functions - serve as the management layer above our fractional finance team ГўВЂВ” controller, AP/AR, and grants specialist ГўВЂВ” ensuring accuracy, timeliness, and alignment with organizational priorities; own the relationship with our fractional CFO and hold the function accountable to deliverables</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Oversee HR Services - manage the relationship with our HR services provider; ensure payroll, benefits administration, compliance, and employee relations are running smoothly and escalate issues appropriately; serve as the internal escalation point for people operations matters</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Own Team Operations - be the point of contact for expense policy, offsite logistics, budget questions, and day-to-day operational matters; ensure the team has clear answers </p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Support Executive Bandwidth - shield the CEO's time from operational and administrative workstreams; prepare briefings and follow-up documentation for high-priority external meetings</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Own State Credentialing and Provider Enrollment - oversee our credentialing team, ensuring we are meeting deadlines for credentialing, licensure, and provider enrollment process in each new state market; maintain tracker for licensing status, renewal timelines, and market readiness</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Lead Market Activation - own the end-to-end operational path from contract execution to first patient encounter in each new market; coordinate across clinical, legal, and BD to remove blockers and keep go-live timelines on track</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Drive Payer Readiness - produce the briefings, readiness assessments, and market entry playbooks the CEO needs to walk into health plan conversations with confident, specific answers</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Build for Replication - ensure every market entry produces a playbook that makes the next one faster ГўВЂВ” state expansion should get more efficient with every go-live</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ 7+ years of experience in operations, chief of staff, strategy, or healthcare administration ГўВЂВ” you've built and overseen functions, not just executed within them</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Demonstrated experience in payer operations, Medicaid managed care, provider enrollment, or value-based contracting ГўВЂВ” you understand how health plans work and what it takes to get contracted</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Experience managing or overseeing finance functions ГўВЂВ” comfortable holding a controller, AP/AR team, or fractional CFO accountable to deliverables</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Experience overseeing HR services or people operations, including vendor management, compliance, and employee relations</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Experience navigating multi-state regulatory or licensing environments in healthcare</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Exceptional judgment about what needs your attention and what doesn't ГўВЂВ” you manage up and manage vendors without creating noise for the CEO</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Strong written and verbal communication; able to produce a payer-facing brief and an internal ops memo in the same week without losing altitude on either</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Comfortable with the pace and ambiguity of a small, high-growth organization</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Preference for owning processes end-to-end, surfacing risks and breakages early on, generating hypotheses, testing rapidly, and iterating with feedback (preference for former founders)</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Excellent communication skills, client-ready </p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Experience with a dual-entity structure (MSO/PC or similar) is a strong plus</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Prior chief of staff experience at a startup, health tech, or mission-driven organization is a strong plus</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Competitive salary commensurate with experience</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Health benefits</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Remote-first with flexibility</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Home office and professional development support</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Equity stake in a mission-driven company at an early and consequential stage</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Clear path to VP/COO as the organization scales</p><p>ГўВЂВўГ‚ Г‚ Г‚ Г‚ Applications reviewed on a rolling basis; strong candidates will be invited for a paid one-week pilot instead of an extended interview loop</p><p></p><p>Equal Opportunity</p><p>Malama is an equal opportunity employer. We strongly encourage applications from Black, Indigenous, Latina/x, and other women of color, people with lived experience of pregnancy, and community members. We believe that diverse teams build better care ГўВЂВ” and we are committed to creating a workplace where every person can do the best work of their career.</p> design, hr, exec Redwood City 2026-06-07T06:00:17+00:00 1132965 https://remoteOK.com/remote-jobs/remote-chief-of-staff-malama-health-1132965 https://remoteOK.com/assets/logo-square.png Applied AI Engineer Bjak <h3>Company</h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">A1 is building a proactive AI smart assistant for everyday users to bring intelligence to conversations, errands, organising and workflows.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">Our product focuses on achieving high reliability for long-running workflows, persistent context, and real-world task completion. The system must handle multi-step reasoning, interact with external tools, and remain reliable despite non-deterministic model behavior.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em"></p><h3>Role</h3><p style="min-height:1.5em">As an Applied AI Engineer, you will turn model capabilities into real product behavior. You will own problems end-to-end, from shaping model behavior, to building the systems around it, to ensuring it performs reliably in production.</p><p style="min-height:1.5em">This role sits at the intersection of machine learning, systems, and product, focusing on making AI actually work for users, not just in demos, but in real-world usage.</p><div style="min-height:1.2em;margin-top:0;margin-bottom:0">Г‚ </div><h3><strong>Focus</strong>&
